CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:SetupCommand.kt$SetupCommand$private fun runWritePlansAtomic( plans: List<AgentConfigWritePlan>, move: (java.nio.file.Path, java.nio.file.Path, Array<out java.nio.file.CopyOption>) -> java.nio.file.Path = { source, target, options -> java.nio.file.Files.move(source, target, *options) }, forceFile: (java.nio.file.Path) -> Unit = AtomicConfigFileWriter::forceRegularFile, forceDirectory: (java.nio.file.Path) -> Unit = AtomicConfigFileWriter::forceDirectoryBestEffort, copyForRollback: (File, File) -> Unit = { source, destination -> source.copyTo(destination, overwrite = true) }, emit: (String) -> Unit = ::echo, )

MaxLineLength:AgentSetupFiles.kt$AgentSetupFiles$put("missing-application-id", JsonPrimitive("No unique applicationId; run from app module or pass --package."))
MaxLineLength:AgentSetupFiles.kt$AgentSetupFiles$put("no-android-context", JsonPrimitive("Run from the Android repo root, or pass --allow-global to write the global codex config anyway."))
MaxLineLength:AgentSetupFiles.kt$AgentSetupFiles$put("no-app-module", JsonPrimitive("Run ./gradlew projects to list modules; pass the correct --package."))
MaxLineLength:AgentSetupFiles.kt$AgentSetupFiles$put("view-system-mixed", JsonPrimitive("Module contains View-based activities; migrate to ComponentActivity + setContent."))

TopLevelPropertyNaming:BridgeClient.kt$// Mirrors BridgeProtocol.VERSION (fixthis-compose-sidekick), the constant in // ServerVersionRoutes.kt (fixthis-mcp), and MinimumSupportedProtocolVersion in // staleness.js. BridgeProtocolVersionSyncTest (`:fixthis-mcp:test`) fails if any // of the 4 sites lag — bump them all together. See docs/reference/bridge-protocol.md. internal const val BridgeProtocolVersion = "1.3"
